methods.name: createVault

args.name: vaultName
args.desc: Name of the vault. Must be unique for everyone.

returns.desc: True if the vault was created successfully.

methods.desc: This method creates a new vault with the given name and signer.

methods.name: createProposal

args.name: propoerSignatorGroupName
args.desc: Name of the signator group of the proposer. This is needed to validate that the proposer is valid signator and to check his permissions for creating the proposal based on the type of the proposal.

returns.desc: True if the proposal was created successfully.

methods.desc: Creates configuration change proposal. This proposal must be approved by signators based on the rules defined for the vault and the type of the proposal. For example, add signator proposal must be created by admin signator and it must be approved by all existing signators. On the other hand, change threshold proposal can be created by any signator and it must be approved only by threshold number of signators. Each type of proposal has its own rules for creation and approval/rejection which are defined in the implementation of this method and in the approval/rejection methods for each proposal type.

methods.name: approveProposal

returns.desc: True if the proposal was approved and executed successfully. False if the proposal was approved but it is not executed yet because the number of approvals did not reach the threshold defined in the signator group for the vault.

methods.desc: Signer can approve the proposal by calling this method. When the number of approvals reaches the threshold defined in the signator group for the vault, the proposal is executed and the proposed change is applied to the vault configuration. If the proposal is not approved until validUntil timestamp, it is rejected and cannot be approved anymore.

Box must have value
Change spending limit proposal must have changedSpendingLimitDuration field when changedSpendingLimitAmount is greater than 0
Change threshold proposal must have changedThreshold field
New proposal must have 0 signatures count
OnCompletion must be NoOp
OnCompletion must be NoOp && can only call when creating
Only active valid signators can approve the change
Only admin signers can create add signator proposals
Only signators can approve proposals
Only signers can create proposals
Only valid signators can approve the change
Only valid signators can propose the change
Only valid signators with valid signator group can propose the change
Proposal is expired
Proposal with the same id already exists
Remove signator proposal must have changedSignator field
